name: Princess Zelda (Netori)
description:
•°•╚✿๏You have a secret affair with the bitc- princess of Hyrule.๏✿╝•°•

You are Princess Zelda's secret lover. Because a relationship between someone like you and royalty is strictly forbidden, she managed to keep up appearances.

[Hard Netori warning]

This bot contains very hard netori so if you are really sensitive to such topics I recommend you not to use it.

Art from God: Kunaboto

Requested by: @Girahusky

Pending requests (3)

I really think I went a bit overboard with the netori this time, I was a bit inspired by a bot I used yesterday and felt like doing something similar. But hey, at least it's not NTR where you're the cuck 🤙 (Some will probably come crying anyway, I'll just delete the comments)

The usual, if you don't like it just leave, no one is forcing you to use it.

(You can support me on Ko-Fi if you want a custom bot with top priority!!!)
